100 C0400B_RCALL_SCND_WORD_CD C0400B_RCALL_SCND_WORD_CD C0400B BIMS: Recall - Able to Recall Blue CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's ability to recall the second word. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No-could not recall
1=Yes, after cueing ("a color")
2=Yes, no cue required
^=Blank(skip pattern)
